summary: ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE V54.7 Complete Spatial Creation Engine Testing - ALL TESTS PASS. 51/51 routes load without crash on mobile 390x844. YOGA BUG FIXED - poses now load correctly when clicking a style (fetches /api/yoga/style/{id}). SpatialRouter auto-wraps all pages. ProximityItem 3-second auto-trigger working. SpatialRecorder (Record Journey + Cinematic Mode) visible on all InteractiveModule pages. Avatar Badge with [x,y] coordinates and 9-segment depth indicator visible on all spatial rooms.
context_for_next_testing_agent: V54.7 Spatial Engine fully verified. All 51 routes pass. YOGA BUG FIXED - poses load correctly. SpatialRouter wraps all pages. ProximityItem auto-trigger works. SpatialRecorder buttons visible. Avatar Badge with coordinates visible on all spatial rooms. Mixer 10 tabs work.

tests_executed.details: Spatial room 'crystals' (HOLLOW_EARTH realm) loads. Avatar badge visible with [4,0] coordinates. 12 crystals load. Chakra filters work (Crown, Third Eye, Heart, Root). Search bar works. Record Journey + Cinematic Mode buttons visible. Tap Clear Quartz expands with DeepDive + XP (+5 XP shown).

7 styles load (Hatha, Vinyasa Flow, Kundalini, etc.). Click Hatha -> fetches /api/yoga/style/hatha -> shows SUNRISE SALUTATION sequence with 8 poses. Each pose expands with +5 XP, Listen button, DeepDive button. BUG FROM ITERATION 337 IS FIXED.
12 herbs load. Body system filters work (Nervous, Endocrine, Immune, Reproductive, Digestive). Proximity glow on active items (2 active, 1 near). Record Journey button visible.
8 items load. Search bar works (filtered to 2 with 'Golden'). Filters: Elixirs & Drinks (5), Sacred Meals (3). Record Journey button visible.
10 positions load. Chakra filters work (Crown, Third_eye, Throat, Heart, Solar, Sacral, Root). Record Journey + Cinematic Mode buttons visible.
25 mudras load. Element filters work (Air, All Five, Fire, Earth + Water, Earth + Ether). Record Journey + Cinematic Mode buttons visible.
3 mantras load. Category filters work (All, Mindfulness, Sacred). Tap expands with Chant + Explore meaning buttons. +5 XP on expand.
Record Journey + Cinematic Mode buttons visible on all InteractiveModule pages: /crystals, /herbology, /nourishment, /reiki, /mudras.
[x,y] coordinates (e.g., [4,0]) + 9-segment depth indicator visible on all spatial rooms: /crystals, /yoga, /herbology, /reiki, /oracle.
All 10 tabs work: ORBIT, MIX, REC, AUDIO, TEXT, LAYER, FX, AI, OUT, ME. Solfeggio frequencies visible (174Hz-963Hz, 7.83Hz, 10Hz).
Spatial room 'teachings' loads. 'Wisdom of the Ages' with Teachers tab (Gautama Buddha, Jesus, Prophet Muhammad). Themes tab available.
Spatial room 'encyclopedia' loads. 'World Spiritual Traditions' with 12 living traditions. VR immersive learning available.
Spatial room 'breathing' (AIR realm) loads. 'Conscious Breathing' with patterns. Video element found. Build Your Own section available.
